STRUCTURAL.notes: All entities use correct per-type schema. Terms have surface+definition, questions have stem+choices+answer_index, figures/tables have caption, sections/chapters have title. All fields trilingual-complete.

SEMANTIC.notes: Answer indices spot-checked for all 7 questions: all correct. Term translations accurate across all 31 terms. Section 04-01 zh title has 3 inconsistent variants (F001). No hallucinated content detected.

CROSS_LANG.notes: All multi-page surface terms consistent. Table rows trilingual-complete. One wrong connector char in p139 section title (F002). EN expansion ratios all legitimate (short JP text).

findings.issue: INCONSISTENT_ZH_TITLE: same section 04-01 has 3 zh variants across pages

detail.p138: 技术开发战略的立案与技术开发计划 (立案=drafting, connector=与)
detail.p139: 技术开发战略的制定·技术开发计划 (制定=establish, connector=· U+00B7 WRONG)
detail.p141: 技术开发战略的制定与技术开发计划 (制定=establish, connector=与)

findings.canonical_jp: 技術開発戦略の立案・技術開発計画
findings.recommendation: Standardize to p138 zh form (立案 closer to JP 立案; use 与 not middle-dot)

findings.issue: WRONG_CONNECTOR_CHAR: uses U+00B7 MIDDLE DOT (·) instead of 与 or ·U+30FB KATAKANA MIDDLE DOT
findings.detail: p139 zh title: '技术开发战略的制定·技术开发计划' — middle dot (·) is typographically wrong in Chinese context; sibling pages use 与
findings.recommendation: Replace · (U+00B7) with 与 to match p138/p141 style
